description:
The quiz assesses knowledge of JavaScript's native Date class, testing practical API usage, edge‑case handling, and understanding of date manipulation without relying on external libraries. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty, presented in an encouraging, informal tone that aims to both challenge and educate.
Topics: JavaScript Date object, Date parsing and formatting, Time zones and localization, Date arithmetic and comparisons, Common pitfalls and best practices
Audience: Front‑end developers, JavaScript programmers, and web engineers who are comfortable with basic language features and want to deepen their mastery of date handling.
